# services.thanos

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.thanos`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.thanos.compact.arguments` | `list of string` | Arguments to the `thanos compact` command. Defaults to a list of arguments formed by converting the structured options of {option}`services.thanos.compact` to a list of arguments. Overriding this option will cause none of the structured options to have any effect. So only set this if you know what you're doing! |
| `services.thanos.compact.compact.concurrency` | `null or signed integer` | Number of goroutines to use when compacting groups. Defaults to `1` in Thanos when set to `null`. |
| `services.thanos.compact.consistency-delay` | `null or string` | Minimum age of fresh (non-compacted) blocks before they are being processed. Malformed blocks older than the maximum of consistency-delay and 30m0s will be removed. Defaults to `30m` in Thanos when set to `null`. |
| `services.thanos.compact.downsampling.disable` | `boolean` | Disables downsampling. This is not recommended as querying long time ranges without non-downsampled data is not efficient and useful e.g it is not possible to render all samples for a human eye anyway |
| `services.thanos.compact.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable the Thanos compactor which continuously compacts blocks in an object store bucket. |
| `services.thanos.compact.http-address` | `null or string` | Listen `host:port` for HTTP endpoints. Defaults to `0.0.0.0:10902` in Thanos when set to `null`. |
| `services.thanos.compact.log.format` | `null or string` | Log format to use. |
| `services.thanos.compact.log.level` | `null or one of "debug", "info", "warn", "error", "fatal"` | Log filtering level. Defaults to `info` in Thanos when set to `null`. |
| `services.thanos.compact.objstore.config` | `YAML 1.1 value` | Object store configuration. When not `null` the attribute set gets converted to a YAML file and stored in the Nix store. The option {option}`objstore.config-file` will default to its path. If {option}`objstore.config-file` is set this option has no effect. See format details: <https://thanos.io/tip/thanos/storage.md/#configuring-access-to-object-storage> |
| `services.thanos.compact.objstore.config-file` | `null or string` | Path to YAML file that contains object store configuration. See format details: <https://thanos.io/tip/thanos/storage.md/#configuring-access-to-object-storage> |
| `services.thanos.compact.retention.resolution-1h` | `null or string` | How long to retain samples of resolution 2 (1 hour) in bucket. `0d` - disables this retention Defaults to `0d` in Thanos when set to `null`. |
| `services.thanos.compact.retention.resolution-5m` | `null or string` | How long to retain samples of resolution 1 (5 minutes) in bucket. `0d` - disables this retention Defaults to `0d` in Thanos when set to `null`. |
| `services.thanos.compact.retention.resolution-raw` | `null or string` | How long to retain raw samples in bucket. `0d` - disables this retention Defaults to `0d` in Thanos when set to `null`. |
| `services.thanos.compact.startAt` | `null or string` | When this option is set to a `systemd.time` specification the Thanos compactor will run at the specified period. When this option is `null` the Thanos compactor service will run continuously. So it will not exit after all compactions have been processed but wait for new work. |
| `services.thanos.compact.stateDir` | `string` | Data directory relative to `/var/lib` in which to cache blocks and process compactions. |
| `services.thanos.compact.tracing.config` | `YAML 1.1 value` | Tracing configuration. When not `null` the attribute set gets converted to a YAML file and stored in the Nix store. The option {option}`tracing.config-file` will default to its path. If {option}`tracing.config-file` is set this option has no effect. See format details: <https://thanos.io/tip/thanos/tracing.md/#configuration> |
| `services.thanos.compact.tracing.config-file` | `null or string` | Path to YAML file that contains tracing configuration. See format details: <https://thanos.io/tip/thanos/tracing.md/#configuration> |
| `services.thanos.downsample.arguments` | `list of string` | Arguments to the `thanos downsample` command. Defaults to a list of arguments formed by converting the structured options of {option}`services.thanos.downsample` to a list of arguments. Overriding this option will cause none of the structured options to have any effect. So only set this if you know what you're doing! |
| `services.thanos.downsample.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable the Thanos downsampler which continuously downsamples blocks in an object store bucket. |
| `services.thanos.downsample.log.format` | `null or string` | Log format to use. |
| `services.thanos.downsample.log.level` | `null or one of "debug", "info", "warn", "error", "fatal"` | Log filtering level. Defaults to `info` in Thanos when set to `null`. |
| `services.thanos.downsample.objstore.config` | `YAML 1.1 value` | Object store configuration. When not `null` the attribute set gets converted to a YAML file and stored in the Nix store. The option {option}`objstore.config-file` will default to its path. If {option}`objstore.config-file` is set this option has no effect. See format details: <https://thanos.io/tip/thanos/storage.md/#configuring-access-to-object-storage> |
| `services.thanos.downsample.objstore.config-file` | `null or string` | Path to YAML file that contains object store configuration. See format details: <https://thanos.io/tip/thanos/storage.md/#configuring-access-to-object-storage> |
| `services.thanos.downsample.stateDir` | `string` | Data directory relative to `/var/lib` in which to cache blocks and process downsamplings. |
| `services.thanos.downsample.tracing.config` | `YAML 1.1 value` | Tracing configuration. When not `null` the attribute set gets converted to a YAML file and stored in the Nix store. The option {option}`tracing.config-file` will default to its path. If {option}`tracing.config-file` is set this option has no effect. See format details: <https://thanos.io/tip/thanos/tracing.md/#configuration> |
| `services.thanos.downsample.tracing.config-file` | `null or string` | Path to YAML file that contains tracing configuration. See format details: <https://thanos.io/tip/thanos/tracing.md/#configuration> |
| `services.thanos.package` | `package` | The thanos package to use. |
| `services.thanos.query-frontend.arguments` | `list of string` | Arguments to the `thanos query-frontend` command. Defaults to a list of arguments formed by converting the structured options of {option}`services.thanos.query-frontend` to a list of arguments. Overriding this option will cause none of the structured options to have any effect. So only set this if you know what you're doing! |
| `services.thanos.query-frontend.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable the Thanos query frontend implements a service deployed in front of queriers to improve query parallelization and caching.. |
| `services.thanos.query-frontend.grpc-address` | `null or string` | Listen `ip:port` address for gRPC endpoints (StoreAPI). Make sure this address is routable from other components. Defaults to `0.0.0.0:10901` in Thanos when set to `null`. |
| `services.thanos.query-frontend.grpc-server-tls-cert` | `null or string` | TLS Certificate for gRPC server, leave blank to disable TLS |
| `services.thanos.query-frontend.grpc-server-tls-client-ca` | `null or string` | TLS CA to verify clients against. If no client CA is specified, there is no client verification on server side. (tls.NoClientCert) |
| `services.thanos.query-frontend.grpc-server-tls-key` | `null or string` | TLS Key for the gRPC server, leave blank to disable TLS |
| `services.thanos.query-frontend.http-address` | `null or string` | Listen `host:port` for HTTP endpoints. Defaults to `0.0.0.0:10902` in Thanos when set to `null`. |
| `services.thanos.query-frontend.log.format` | `null or string` | Log format to use. |
| `services.thanos.query-frontend.log.level` | `null or one of "debug", "info", "warn", "error", "fatal"` | Log filtering level. Defaults to `info` in Thanos when set to `null`. |
| `services.thanos.query-frontend.query-frontend.downstream-url` | `null or string` | URL of downstream Prometheus Query compatible API. Defaults to `http://localhost:9090` in Thanos when set to `null`. |
| `services.thanos.query-frontend.tracing.config` | `YAML 1.1 value` | Tracing configuration. When not `null` the attribute set gets converted to a YAML file and stored in the Nix store. The option {option}`tracing.config-file` will default to its path. If {option}`tracing.config-file` is set this option has no effect. See format details: <https://thanos.io/tip/thanos/tracing.md/#configuration> |
| `services.thanos.query-frontend.tracing.config-file` | `null or string` | Path to YAML file that contains tracing configuration. See format details: <https://thanos.io/tip/thanos/tracing.md/#configuration> |
| `services.thanos.query.arguments` | `list of string` | Arguments to the `thanos query` command. Defaults to a list of arguments formed by converting the structured options of {option}`services.thanos.query` to a list of arguments. Overriding this option will cause none of the structured options to have any effect. So only set this if you know what you're doing! |
| `services.thanos.query.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable the Thanos query node exposing PromQL enabled Query API with data retrieved from multiple store nodes. |
| `services.thanos.query.endpoints` | `list of string` | Addresses of statically configured Thanos API servers (repeatable). The scheme may be prefixed with 'dns+' or 'dnssrv+' to detect Thanos API servers through respective DNS lookups. |
| `services.thanos.query.grpc-address` | `null or string` | Listen `ip:port` address for gRPC endpoints (StoreAPI). Make sure this address is routable from other components. Defaults to `0.0.0.0:10901` in Thanos when set to `null`. |
| `services.thanos.query.grpc-client-server-name` | `null or string` | Server name to verify the hostname on the returned gRPC certificates. See <https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc4366#section-3.1> |
| `services.thanos.query.grpc-client-tls-ca` | `null or string` | TLS CA Certificates to use to verify gRPC servers |
| `services.thanos.query.grpc-client-tls-cert` | `null or string` | TLS Certificates to use to identify this client to the server |
| `services.thanos.query.grpc-client-tls-key` | `null or string` | TLS Key for the client's certificate |
| `services.thanos.query.grpc-client-tls-secure` | `boolean` | Use TLS when talking to the gRPC server |
| `services.thanos.query.grpc-compression` | `null or string` | Compression algorithm to use for gRPC requests to other clients. |
| `services.thanos.query.grpc-server-tls-cert` | `null or string` | TLS Certificate for gRPC server, leave blank to disable TLS |
| `services.thanos.query.grpc-server-tls-client-ca` | `null or string` | TLS CA to verify clients against. If no client CA is specified, there is no client verification on server side. (tls.NoClientCert) |
| `services.thanos.query.grpc-server-tls-key` | `null or string` | TLS Key for the gRPC server, leave blank to disable TLS |
| `services.thanos.query.http-address` | `null or string` | Listen `host:port` for HTTP endpoints. Defaults to `0.0.0.0:10902` in Thanos when set to `null`. |
| `services.thanos.query.log.format` | `null or string` | Log format to use. |
| `services.thanos.query.log.level` | `null or one of "debug", "info", "warn", "error", "fatal"` | Log filtering level. Defaults to `info` in Thanos when set to `null`. |
| `services.thanos.query.query.auto-downsampling` | `boolean` | Enable automatic adjustment (step / 5) to what source of data should be used in store gateways if no `max_source_resolution` param is specified. |
| `services.thanos.query.query.default-evaluation-interval` | `null or string` | Set default evaluation interval for sub queries. Defaults to `1m` in Thanos when set to `null`. |
| `services.thanos.query.query.max-concurrent` | `null or signed integer` | Maximum number of queries processed concurrently by query node. Defaults to `20` in Thanos when set to `null`. |
| `services.thanos.query.query.partial-response` | `boolean` | Enable partial response for queries if no `partial_response` param is specified. |
| `services.thanos.query.query.replica-labels` | `list of string` | Labels to treat as a replica indicator along which data is deduplicated. Still you will be able to query without deduplication using 'dedup=false' parameter. Data includes time series, recording rules, and alerting rules. |
| `services.thanos.query.query.timeout` | `null or string` | Maximum time to process query by query node. Defaults to `2m` in Thanos when set to `null`. |
| `services.thanos.query.selector-labels` | `attribute set of string` | Query selector labels that will be exposed in info endpoint. |
| `services.thanos.query.store.response-timeout` | `null or string` | If a Store doesn't send any data in this specified duration then a Store will be ignored and partial data will be returned if it's enabled. `0` disables timeout. Defaults to `0ms` in Thanos when set to `null`. |
| `services.thanos.query.store.sd-dns-interval` | `null or string` | Interval between DNS resolutions. Defaults to `30s` in Thanos when set to `null`. |
| `services.thanos.query.store.sd-files` | `list of string` | Path to files that contain addresses of store API servers. The path can be a glob pattern. |
| `services.thanos.query.store.sd-interval` | `null or string` | Refresh interval to re-read file SD files. It is used as a resync fallback. Defaults to `5m` in Thanos when set to `null`. |
| `services.thanos.query.store.unhealthy-timeout` | `null or string` | Timeout before an unhealthy store is cleaned from the store UI page. Defaults to `5m` in Thanos when set to `null`. |
| `services.thanos.query.tracing.config` | `YAML 1.1 value` | Tracing configuration. When not `null` the attribute set gets converted to a YAML file and stored in the Nix store. The option {option}`tracing.config-file` will default to its path. If {option}`tracing.config-file` is set this option has no effect. See format details: <https://thanos.io/tip/thanos/tracing.md/#configuration> |
| `services.thanos.query.tracing.config-file` | `null or string` | Path to YAML file that contains tracing configuration. See format details: <https://thanos.io/tip/thanos/tracing.md/#configuration> |
| `services.thanos.query.web.external-prefix` | `null or string` | Static prefix for all HTML links and redirect URLs in the UI query web interface. Actual endpoints are still served on / or the {option}`web.route-prefix`. This allows thanos UI to be served behind a reverse proxy that strips a URL sub-path. |
| `services.thanos.query.web.prefix-header` | `null or string` | Name of HTTP request header used for dynamic prefixing of UI links and redirects. This option is ignored if the option `web.external-prefix` is set. Security risk: enable this option only if a reverse proxy in front of thanos is resetting the header. The setting `web.prefix-header="X-Forwarded-Prefix"` can be useful, for example, if Thanos UI is served via Traefik reverse proxy with `PathPrefixStrip` option enabled, which sends the stripped prefix value in `X-Forwarded-Prefix` header. This allows thanos UI to be served on a sub-path. |
| `services.thanos.query.web.route-prefix` | `null or string` | Prefix for API and UI endpoints. This allows thanos UI to be served on a sub-path. This option is analogous to {option}`web.route-prefix` of Promethus. |
| `services.thanos.receive.arguments` | `list of string` | Arguments to the `thanos receive` command. Defaults to a list of arguments formed by converting the structured options of {option}`services.thanos.receive` to a list of arguments. Overriding this option will cause none of the structured options to have any effect. So only set this if you know what you're doing! |
| `services.thanos.receive.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable the Thanos receiver which accept Prometheus remote write API requests and write to local tsdb. |
| `services.thanos.receive.grpc-address` | `null or string` | Listen `ip:port` address for gRPC endpoints (StoreAPI). Make sure this address is routable from other components. Defaults to `0.0.0.0:10901` in Thanos when set to `null`. |
| `services.thanos.receive.grpc-server-tls-cert` | `null or string` | TLS Certificate for gRPC server, leave blank to disable TLS |
| `services.thanos.receive.grpc-server-tls-client-ca` | `null or string` | TLS CA to verify clients against. If no client CA is specified, there is no client verification on server side. (tls.NoClientCert) |
| `services.thanos.receive.grpc-server-tls-key` | `null or string` | TLS Key for the gRPC server, leave blank to disable TLS |
| `services.thanos.receive.http-address` | `null or string` | Listen `host:port` for HTTP endpoints. Defaults to `0.0.0.0:10902` in Thanos when set to `null`. |
| `services.thanos.receive.labels` | `attribute set of string` | External labels to announce. This flag will be removed in the future when handling multiple tsdb instances is added. |
| `services.thanos.receive.log.format` | `null or string` | Log format to use. |
| `services.thanos.receive.log.level` | `null or one of "debug", "info", "warn", "error", "fatal"` | Log filtering level. Defaults to `info` in Thanos when set to `null`. |
| `services.thanos.receive.objstore.config` | `YAML 1.1 value` | Object store configuration. When not `null` the attribute set gets converted to a YAML file and stored in the Nix store. The option {option}`objstore.config-file` will default to its path. If {option}`objstore.config-file` is set this option has no effect. See format details: <https://thanos.io/tip/thanos/storage.md/#configuring-access-to-object-storage> |
| `services.thanos.receive.objstore.config-file` | `null or string` | Path to YAML file that contains object store configuration. See format details: <https://thanos.io/tip/thanos/storage.md/#configuring-access-to-object-storage> |
| `services.thanos.receive.receive.grpc-compression` | `null or string` | Compression algorithm to use for gRPC requests to other receivers. |
| `services.thanos.receive.remote-write.address` | `null or string` | Address to listen on for remote write requests. Defaults to `0.0.0.0:19291` in Thanos when set to `null`. |
| `services.thanos.receive.stateDir` | `string` | Data directory relative to `/var/lib` of TSDB. |
| `services.thanos.receive.tracing.config` | `YAML 1.1 value` | Tracing configuration. When not `null` the attribute set gets converted to a YAML file and stored in the Nix store. The option {option}`tracing.config-file` will default to its path. If {option}`tracing.config-file` is set this option has no effect. See format details: <https://thanos.io/tip/thanos/tracing.md/#configuration> |
| `services.thanos.receive.tracing.config-file` | `null or string` | Path to YAML file that contains tracing configuration. See format details: <https://thanos.io/tip/thanos/tracing.md/#configuration> |
| `services.thanos.receive.tsdb.retention` | `null or string` | How long to retain raw samples on local storage. `0d` - disables this retention Defaults to `15d` in Thanos when set to `null`. |
| `services.thanos.rule.alert.label-drop` | `list of string` | Labels by name to drop before sending to alertmanager. This allows alert to be deduplicated on replica label. Similar Prometheus alert relabelling |
| `services.thanos.rule.alert.query-url` | `null or string` | The external Thanos Query URL that would be set in all alerts 'Source' field. |
| `services.thanos.rule.alertmanagers.send-timeout` | `null or string` | Timeout for sending alerts to alertmanager. Defaults to `10s` in Thanos when set to `null`. |
| `services.thanos.rule.alertmanagers.urls` | `list of string` | Alertmanager replica URLs to push firing alerts. Ruler claims success if push to at least one alertmanager from discovered succeeds. The scheme may be prefixed with `dns+` or `dnssrv+` to detect Alertmanager IPs through respective DNS lookups. The port defaults to `9093` or the SRV record's value. The URL path is used as a prefix for the regular Alertmanager API path. |
| `services.thanos.rule.arguments` | `list of string` | Arguments to the `thanos rule` command. Defaults to a list of arguments formed by converting the structured options of {option}`services.thanos.rule` to a list of arguments. Overriding this option will cause none of the structured options to have any effect. So only set this if you know what you're doing! |
| `services.thanos.rule.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable the Thanos ruler service which evaluates Prometheus rules against given Query nodes, exposing Store API and storing old blocks in bucket. |
| `services.thanos.rule.eval-interval` | `null or string` | The default evaluation interval to use. Defaults to `1m` in Thanos when set to `null`. |
| `services.thanos.rule.grpc-address` | `null or string` | Listen `ip:port` address for gRPC endpoints (StoreAPI). Make sure this address is routable from other components. Defaults to `0.0.0.0:10901` in Thanos when set to `null`. |
| `services.thanos.rule.grpc-server-tls-cert` | `null or string` | TLS Certificate for gRPC server, leave blank to disable TLS |
| `services.thanos.rule.grpc-server-tls-client-ca` | `null or string` | TLS CA to verify clients against. If no client CA is specified, there is no client verification on server side. (tls.NoClientCert) |
| `services.thanos.rule.grpc-server-tls-key` | `null or string` | TLS Key for the gRPC server, leave blank to disable TLS |
| `services.thanos.rule.http-address` | `null or string` | Listen `host:port` for HTTP endpoints. Defaults to `0.0.0.0:10902` in Thanos when set to `null`. |
| `services.thanos.rule.labels` | `attribute set of string` | Labels to be applied to all generated metrics. Similar to external labels for Prometheus, used to identify ruler and its blocks as unique source. |
| `services.thanos.rule.log.format` | `null or string` | Log format to use. |
| `services.thanos.rule.log.level` | `null or one of "debug", "info", "warn", "error", "fatal"` | Log filtering level. Defaults to `info` in Thanos when set to `null`. |
| `services.thanos.rule.objstore.config` | `YAML 1.1 value` | Object store configuration. When not `null` the attribute set gets converted to a YAML file and stored in the Nix store. The option {option}`objstore.config-file` will default to its path. If {option}`objstore.config-file` is set this option has no effect. See format details: <https://thanos.io/tip/thanos/storage.md/#configuring-access-to-object-storage> |
| `services.thanos.rule.objstore.config-file` | `null or string` | Path to YAML file that contains object store configuration. See format details: <https://thanos.io/tip/thanos/storage.md/#configuring-access-to-object-storage> |
| `services.thanos.rule.query.addresses` | `list of string` | Addresses of statically configured query API servers. The scheme may be prefixed with `dns+` or `dnssrv+` to detect query API servers through respective DNS lookups. |
| `services.thanos.rule.query.sd-dns-interval` | `null or string` | Interval between DNS resolutions. Defaults to `30s` in Thanos when set to `null`. |
| `services.thanos.rule.query.sd-files` | `list of string` | Path to file that contain addresses of query peers. The path can be a glob pattern. |
| `services.thanos.rule.query.sd-interval` | `null or string` | Refresh interval to re-read file SD files. (used as a fallback) Defaults to `5m` in Thanos when set to `null`. |
| `services.thanos.rule.rule-files` | `list of string` | Rule files that should be used by rule manager. Can be in glob format. |
| `services.thanos.rule.stateDir` | `string` | Data directory relative to `/var/lib`. |
| `services.thanos.rule.tracing.config` | `YAML 1.1 value` | Tracing configuration. When not `null` the attribute set gets converted to a YAML file and stored in the Nix store. The option {option}`tracing.config-file` will default to its path. If {option}`tracing.config-file` is set this option has no effect. See format details: <https://thanos.io/tip/thanos/tracing.md/#configuration> |
| `services.thanos.rule.tracing.config-file` | `null or string` | Path to YAML file that contains tracing configuration. See format details: <https://thanos.io/tip/thanos/tracing.md/#configuration> |
| `services.thanos.rule.tsdb.block-duration` | `null or string` | Block duration for TSDB block. Defaults to `2h` in Thanos when set to `null`. |
| `services.thanos.rule.tsdb.retention` | `null or string` | Block retention time on local disk. Defaults to `48h` in Thanos when set to `null`. |
| `services.thanos.rule.web.external-prefix` | `null or string` | Static prefix for all HTML links and redirect URLs in the UI query web interface. Actual endpoints are still served on / or the {option}`web.route-prefix`. This allows thanos UI to be served behind a reverse proxy that strips a URL sub-path. |
| `services.thanos.rule.web.prefix-header` | `null or string` | Name of HTTP request header used for dynamic prefixing of UI links and redirects. This option is ignored if the option {option}`web.external-prefix` is set. Security risk: enable this option only if a reverse proxy in front of thanos is resetting the header. The header `X-Forwarded-Prefix` can be useful, for example, if Thanos UI is served via Traefik reverse proxy with `PathPrefixStrip` option enabled, which sends the stripped prefix value in `X-Forwarded-Prefix` header. This allows thanos UI to be served on a sub-path. |
| `services.thanos.rule.web.route-prefix` | `null or string` | Prefix for API and UI endpoints. This allows thanos UI to be served on a sub-path. This option is analogous to `--web.route-prefix` of Promethus. |
| `services.thanos.sidecar.arguments` | `list of string` | Arguments to the `thanos sidecar` command. Defaults to a list of arguments formed by converting the structured options of {option}`services.thanos.sidecar` to a list of arguments. Overriding this option will cause none of the structured options to have any effect. So only set this if you know what you're doing! |
| `services.thanos.sidecar.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable the Thanos sidecar for Prometheus server. |
| `services.thanos.sidecar.grpc-address` | `null or string` | Listen `ip:port` address for gRPC endpoints (StoreAPI). Make sure this address is routable from other components. Defaults to `0.0.0.0:10901` in Thanos when set to `null`. |
| `services.thanos.sidecar.grpc-server-tls-cert` | `null or string` | TLS Certificate for gRPC server, leave blank to disable TLS |
| `services.thanos.sidecar.grpc-server-tls-client-ca` | `null or string` | TLS CA to verify clients against. If no client CA is specified, there is no client verification on server side. (tls.NoClientCert) |
| `services.thanos.sidecar.grpc-server-tls-key` | `null or string` | TLS Key for the gRPC server, leave blank to disable TLS |
| `services.thanos.sidecar.http-address` | `null or string` | Listen `host:port` for HTTP endpoints. Defaults to `0.0.0.0:10902` in Thanos when set to `null`. |
| `services.thanos.sidecar.log.format` | `null or string` | Log format to use. |
| `services.thanos.sidecar.log.level` | `null or one of "debug", "info", "warn", "error", "fatal"` | Log filtering level. Defaults to `info` in Thanos when set to `null`. |
| `services.thanos.sidecar.objstore.config` | `YAML 1.1 value` | Object store configuration. When not `null` the attribute set gets converted to a YAML file and stored in the Nix store. The option {option}`objstore.config-file` will default to its path. If {option}`objstore.config-file` is set this option has no effect. See format details: <https://thanos.io/tip/thanos/storage.md/#configuring-access-to-object-storage> |
| `services.thanos.sidecar.objstore.config-file` | `null or string` | Path to YAML file that contains object store configuration. See format details: <https://thanos.io/tip/thanos/storage.md/#configuring-access-to-object-storage> |
| `services.thanos.sidecar.prometheus.url` | `null or string` | URL at which to reach Prometheus's API. For better performance use local network. Defaults to `http://localhost:9090` in Thanos when set to `null`. |
| `services.thanos.sidecar.reloader.config-envsubst-file` | `null or string` | Output file for environment variable substituted config file. |
| `services.thanos.sidecar.reloader.config-file` | `null or string` | Config file watched by the reloader. |
| `services.thanos.sidecar.reloader.rule-dirs` | `list of string` | Rule directories for the reloader to refresh. |
| `services.thanos.sidecar.tracing.config` | `YAML 1.1 value` | Tracing configuration. When not `null` the attribute set gets converted to a YAML file and stored in the Nix store. The option {option}`tracing.config-file` will default to its path. If {option}`tracing.config-file` is set this option has no effect. See format details: <https://thanos.io/tip/thanos/tracing.md/#configuration> |
| `services.thanos.sidecar.tracing.config-file` | `null or string` | Path to YAML file that contains tracing configuration. See format details: <https://thanos.io/tip/thanos/tracing.md/#configuration> |
| `services.thanos.sidecar.tsdb.path` | `string` | Data directory of TSDB. |
| `services.thanos.store.arguments` | `list of string` | Arguments to the `thanos store` command. Defaults to a list of arguments formed by converting the structured options of {option}`services.thanos.store` to a list of arguments. Overriding this option will cause none of the structured options to have any effect. So only set this if you know what you're doing! |
| `services.thanos.store.block-sync-concurrency` | `null or signed integer` | Number of goroutines to use when syncing blocks from object storage. Defaults to `20` in Thanos when set to `null`. |
| `services.thanos.store.chunk-pool-size` | `null or string` | Maximum size of concurrently allocatable bytes for chunks. Defaults to `2GB` in Thanos when set to `null`. |
| `services.thanos.store.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable the Thanos store node giving access to blocks in a bucket provider. |
| `services.thanos.store.grpc-address` | `null or string` | Listen `ip:port` address for gRPC endpoints (StoreAPI). Make sure this address is routable from other components. Defaults to `0.0.0.0:10901` in Thanos when set to `null`. |
| `services.thanos.store.grpc-server-tls-cert` | `null or string` | TLS Certificate for gRPC server, leave blank to disable TLS |
| `services.thanos.store.grpc-server-tls-client-ca` | `null or string` | TLS CA to verify clients against. If no client CA is specified, there is no client verification on server side. (tls.NoClientCert) |
| `services.thanos.store.grpc-server-tls-key` | `null or string` | TLS Key for the gRPC server, leave blank to disable TLS |
| `services.thanos.store.http-address` | `null or string` | Listen `host:port` for HTTP endpoints. Defaults to `0.0.0.0:10902` in Thanos when set to `null`. |
| `services.thanos.store.index-cache-size` | `null or string` | Maximum size of items held in the index cache. Defaults to `250MB` in Thanos when set to `null`. |
| `services.thanos.store.log.format` | `null or string` | Log format to use. |
| `services.thanos.store.log.level` | `null or one of "debug", "info", "warn", "error", "fatal"` | Log filtering level. Defaults to `info` in Thanos when set to `null`. |
| `services.thanos.store.max-time` | `null or string` | End of time range limit to serve. Thanos Store serves only blocks, which happened earlier than this value. Option can be a constant time in RFC3339 format or time duration relative to current time, such as -1d or 2h45m. Valid duration units are ms, s, m, h, d, w, y. Defaults to `9999-12-31T23:59:59Z` in Thanos when set to `null`. |
| `services.thanos.store.min-time` | `null or string` | Start of time range limit to serve. Thanos Store serves only metrics, which happened later than this value. Option can be a constant time in RFC3339 format or time duration relative to current time, such as -1d or 2h45m. Valid duration units are ms, s, m, h, d, w, y. Defaults to `0000-01-01T00:00:00Z` in Thanos when set to `null`. |
| `services.thanos.store.objstore.config` | `YAML 1.1 value` | Object store configuration. When not `null` the attribute set gets converted to a YAML file and stored in the Nix store. The option {option}`objstore.config-file` will default to its path. If {option}`objstore.config-file` is set this option has no effect. See format details: <https://thanos.io/tip/thanos/storage.md/#configuring-access-to-object-storage> |
| `services.thanos.store.objstore.config-file` | `null or string` | Path to YAML file that contains object store configuration. See format details: <https://thanos.io/tip/thanos/storage.md/#configuring-access-to-object-storage> |
| `services.thanos.store.stateDir` | `string` | Data directory relative to `/var/lib` in which to cache remote blocks. |
| `services.thanos.store.store.grpc.series-max-concurrency` | `null or signed integer` | Maximum number of concurrent Series calls. Defaults to `20` in Thanos when set to `null`. |
| `services.thanos.store.store.limits.request-samples` | `null or signed integer` | The maximum samples allowed for a single Series request. The Series call fails if this limit is exceeded. `0` means no limit. NOTE: For efficiency the limit is internally implemented as 'chunks limit' considering each chunk contains a maximum of 120 samples. Defaults to `0` in Thanos when set to `null`. |
| `services.thanos.store.sync-block-duration` | `null or string` | Repeat interval for syncing the blocks between local and remote view. Defaults to `3m` in Thanos when set to `null`. |
| `services.thanos.store.tracing.config` | `YAML 1.1 value` | Tracing configuration. When not `null` the attribute set gets converted to a YAML file and stored in the Nix store. The option {option}`tracing.config-file` will default to its path. If {option}`tracing.config-file` is set this option has no effect. See format details: <https://thanos.io/tip/thanos/tracing.md/#configuration> |
| `services.thanos.store.tracing.config-file` | `null or string` | Path to YAML file that contains tracing configuration. See format details: <https://thanos.io/tip/thanos/tracing.md/#configuration> |
